entity_types.name: PERSON
entity_types.description: A named individual involved in the narrative.

entity_types.name: ORGANIZATION
entity_types.description: A named institution, authority, or group.

entity_types.name: ARTIFACT
entity_types.description: A concrete object of narrative importance.

entity_types.name: EVENT
entity_types.description: A notable incident or coordinated action.

entity_types.name: DOCUMENT
entity_types.description: A written record or archival material.

edge_types.name: ASKED_TO_INSPECT
edge_types.description: A person assigned another person to inspect an artifact.

edge_types.name: DISCOVERED
edge_types.description: A person discovered an artifact or important object.

edge_types.name: EXCHANGED
edge_types.description: A person exchanged or maintained a document.

edge_types.name: LOCATED_IN
edge_types.description: An artifact was located in a place.

edge_types.name: ESCORTED_TO
edge_types.description: A person escorted someone to a location.

edge_types.name: DEPOSITED_IN
edge_types.description: A person deposited an artifact or document in an organization.

analysis_summary: Manual ontology for Graphiti smoke validation.
